channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Warriors to retire Andre Iguodala's No. 9 jersey
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — As Andre Iguodala moves around town in the Bay Area these days, he is regularly stopped by fans eager to praise him for how he carried himself while playing for the Golden State Warriors. For his grit and his drive. For doing all the little things many never saw.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Scottie Scheffler details his hand injury from making ravioli and is ready to get back to golf
item.description: Scottie Scheffler felt frustrated sitting at home for two tournaments he normally plays while recovering from glass puncturing the the palm of his right hand while making ravioli. A big part of him was thankful the injury wasn't worse.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Former NFL star J.J. Watt has strong words for Pro Bowl after numerous players drop out
item.description: Twenty-four Pro Bowl alternates were named Tuesday, prompting five-time selection J.J. Watt to go scorched earth on what he suggests is a watered-down honor.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bears hire Dennis Allen as defensive coordinator under new coach Ben Johnson
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. (AP) — The Chicago Bears have hired Dennis Allen as defensive coordinator and Declan Doyle as offensive coordinator under new coach Ben Johnson. Chicago also is keeping Richard Hightower as special teams coordinator as it looks to rebound after going 5-12 this season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Cal and Stanford feel the travel grind in their first ACC season
item.description: Plus, the Saint Mary's men are set to resume their rivalry with Gonzaga and the Cal women host North Carolina in a ranked showdown.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Faraudo, The Mercury News

item.title: Lady Vols coach Kim Caldwell returns 1 week after giving birth to son
item.description: KNOXVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Tennessee coach Kim Caldwell returned to the sideline a week after giving birth to a son and was greeted with a standing ovation from a crowd of 12,033 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: AL LESAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vanderbilt fined $500K after fans storm basketball court after victory over Kentucky
item.description: Officials said Vanderbilt will need to pay the University of Kentucky $500,000 for a third offense under the league's current policy.
item.dc:creator: Colleen Guerry, NewsNation

item.title: Taylor Swift watches boyfriend Travis Kelce and the Chiefs beat the Bills and get back to Super Bowl
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — You could say that Taylor Swift's championship era has reached its second consecutive season.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mahomes and the Chiefs will face Hurts, Barkley and the Eagles as they seek a Super Bowl three-peat
item.description: Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and the Kansas City Chiefs are going for a three-peat in a Super Bowl rematch. This time, Jalen Hurts and the Philadelphia Eagles have Saquon Barkley. The Eagles and Chiefs will face off for the Lombardi Trophy for the second time in three years on Feb.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: UVU wins 10th straight game, beating Seattle 70-66
item.description: SEATTLE (ABC4 Sports) - There is no slowing down the Utah Valley men's basketball team right now. Carter Welling scored a career-high 24 points, and Dominick Nelson added 16 as Utah Valley earned a hard-fought 70-66 road win over Seattle U on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 25-year-old San Diego native pursuing pro golf dreams at Farmers Invitational
item.description: The Farmer's Insurance Invitational, presented by the Advocates Professional Golf Association (APGA) Tour, is taking place on the North Course at Torrey Pines, showcasing the next generation of professional golfers and supporting minority players who dream of joining the PGA Tour.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5

item.title: Australian Open: Keys upsets 2-time champion Sabalenka in women's final for 1st Grand Slam title
item.description: When Madison Keys stepped into Rod Laver Arena at 7:37 p.m. on Saturday night ahead of the Australian Open final, she strode right past the Daphne Akhurst Memorial Cup, the trophy that goes to the women's champion and was placed on a pedestal near the entrance to the court.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Hurricanes acquire Rantanen from Avs, Hall from Blackhawks in 3-team trade
item.description: For the second straight year, the Carolina Hurricanes are taking a significant swing to bolster a perennial playoff team.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Legendary former USC football coach will reportedly return to the NFL
item.description: A former National Championship-winning coach for the University of Southern California is taking his talents back to the NFL.
item.dc:creator: KTLA 5

item.title: Montrose girls & boys basketball is rolling and ready to take that next step
item.description: With defense, work ethic and belief in themselves, Montrose boys and girls basketball believe the sky is the limit.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: LIST: NBA All-Star 2025 events to take place in San Francisco, Oakland
item.description: (KRON) -- For the first time since in a quarter of a century, the NBA All-Star game is back in the Bay Area. The last time NBA All-Star weekend was in the Bay Area in 2000.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4
